title: Ofgem framework document
text:
Ofgem
 is a non-ministerial department sponsored by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (
DESNZ
).

This document provides the broad framework for how Ofgem and 
DESNZ
 will work together. It also sets out certain governance and decision-making responsibilities of Ofgem and their accountabilities to 
DESNZ
 and Parliament.

Framework document between the Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero and The Gas and Electricity Markets Authority

PDF
, 
1.06 MB
, 
28 pages
description: This framework agreement is between the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero and Ofgem.
